title: stelis scabrida
intro: Stelis scabrida, also known as the Rough Stelis, is a type of orchid species native to Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis scabrida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Stelis scabrida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
